offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, difficulty in matching receipts causes cash flow gaps. We automate the matching process instead of manual reconciliation of receipts and statements.
problem: Difficulty in matching expense receipts with credit card statements
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among sellers
try_it: Let users try receipt scanning and manual entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
